title: MindWatch
subtitle: Multimodal Seizure Prediction
short: A multimodal AI system designed to identify pre-ictal patterns and support early seizure-risk prediction.
problem: Seizure warning systems require reliable interpretation of complex physiological signals before seizure onset.
solution: MindWatch combines multimodal physiological signals with deep learning to identify pre-ictal patterns and support earlier risk prediction.
models: CNN for deep feature extraction and BiLSTM for temporal pattern learning.

title: Logistics RAG Assistant
subtitle: Grounded Supply-Chain Knowledge Assistant
short: A RAG assistant that retrieves trusted logistics knowledge and generates grounded recommendations.
problem: Logistics teams need fast access to reliable supply-chain information.
solution: The assistant retrieves relevant knowledge, generates grounded answers, and recommends solutions.
models: Semantic embeddings, vector retrieval, prompt engineering, and large language models.

title: Mersad
subtitle: AI-Based Safety Equipment Monitoring
short: A real-time PPE monitoring system for workplace safety.
problem: Manual PPE monitoring can be inconsistent and difficult to scale.
solution: Mersad uses computer vision to detect PPE violations and support automated monitoring.

title: Arabic News Understanding
subtitle: Classification, Summarization, and 5W Extraction
short: An Arabic NLP system for news classification, summarization, and information extraction.
problem: Arabic news content is large and difficult to analyze manually at scale.
solution: The system combines classification, summarization, and structured extraction.
models: CAMeLBERT-MSA, AraT5, BiLSTM, and prompt-based extraction.

title: Flight Delay Prediction
subtitle: Predictive Analytics for Aviation
short: A machine learning model for predicting flight delays.
problem: Flight delays affect passengers, operations, and resource planning.
solution: The model combines operational and environmental features to estimate delay risk.
models: XGBoost with feature engineering and tuning.

title: Multi-Behavior Recommendation
subtitle: Graph-Based Recommendation System
short: A recommender that learns from views, favorites, carts, and purchases.
problem: Single-behavior recommenders overlook useful user signals.
solution: The system models multiple interaction types with behavior-aware weighting.

title: Image Classification & OOD Detection
subtitle: Scene Classification and Anomaly Detection
short: A vision project comparing classical and deep approaches.
problem: Vision systems can fail on unfamiliar scenes.
solution: The project compares handcrafted and deep features and evaluates OOD detection.

title: Wakib
subtitle: AI-Powered Academic Knowledge Management
short: An academic knowledge management system aligned with labor-market needs.
problem: Academic programs need stronger data-driven market alignment.
solution: Wakib identifies curriculum gaps and generates recommendations.
models: NLP, text mining, RAG, recommendations, clustering, and dashboards.

title: Enterprise AI Assistant
subtitle: Private Internal Knowledge and Service Assistant
short: A private enterprise assistant for knowledge retrieval and service automation.
problem: Employees spend time searching internal systems and handling repetitive requests.
solution: The assistant connects internal knowledge with common workflows.
models: Enterprise retrieval, generative AI, and workflow automation.
